prompt_text: Suggest a grocery list for a family of four for one week.
response_text:
# Weekly Grocery List for a Family of Four

## Proteins
- Chicken breasts (2 lbs)
- Ground beef (1.5 lbs)
- Eggs (1 dozen)
- Greek yogurt
- Cheddar cheese
- Deli turkey

## Produce
- Broccoli
- Carrots
- Bell peppers (3)
- Onions (2)
- Lettuce/spinach
- Tomatoes (4)
- Potatoes (5 lbs)
- Apples (6)
- Bananas (1 bunch)
- Frozen berries

## Grains & Bread
- Whole wheat bread
- Brown rice
- Pasta
- Oats
- Cereal

## Dairy & Alternatives
- Milk (2 gallons)
- Butter
- Sour cream
- Mozzarella cheese

## Pantry Staples
- Olive oil
- Pasta sauce
- Canned beans (2-3 cans)
- Peanut butter
- Honey
- Salt & pepper

## Frozen Foods
- Frozen vegetables
- Ice cream

## Snacks
- Granola bars
- Crackers
- Nuts

**Tip:** Adjust quantities based on your family's preferences and dietary needs. Plan meals before shopping to minimize waste.
